task_description: Upgrade Khmer Store from V3 to V4 - a fully professional, polished marketplace website. Redesign all pages with premium UI, add shared components, upgrade the admin panel, and ensure professional-grade design across the entire application.

verification.summary: Build passes with 27 routes + robots.txt + sitemap.xml. TypeScript compilation clean. All 111 source files compile without errors. Project grew from 92 to 111 files. No test framework configured - build success is the validation metric.
